inputs.prompt: Platform: Netflix. Title: The Algorithm. Format: 4 x 60 min documentary series. Subject: Four people whose lives were fundamentally altered by automated decision-making systems — a teacher fired by an AI evaluation tool, a patient whose insurance claim was denied by algorithm, a teenager flagged by predictive policing, a job applicant rejected by CV-screening software. Target audience: 25-45, socially conscious, technology-interested. Comparables: The Social Dilemma, Coded Bias.
Platform: Amazon Prime. Title: Deep Water. Format: Feature documentary, 90 min. Subject: Competitive freediving. Audience: Sports and adventure documentary fans.

Platform: Canal+. Title: Les Invisibles. Format: 6 x 45 min documentary series. Subject: Undocumented workers in six sectors of the French economy, from restaurants to construction, agriculture to domestic care. Target audience: French-speaking viewers interested in social justice and labour issues. Comparables: Au Bord du Monde (Canal+), Human (Arte).
